title: Workflow Preflight Evidence Schema
description: Schema for validating the structure of preflight evidence emitted by workflow entrypoints.

evidence_key.description: The unique identifier for the execution payload.

agent.description: The active AI agent or entrypoint asserting preflight.

status.description: The verdict of the preflight check.

timestamp.description: Epoch timestamp of when the evidence was evaluated.

issue_number.description: Exact issue identifier linked to the execution.

pr_number.description: Exact PR identifier linked to the execution.

branch.description: The active git branch tied to the execution.

worktree.description: The isolated git worktree tied to the execution.

request_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the triggering user intent or prompt.

checkpoint_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the current queue or queue segment.

github_truth_timestamp.description: Timestamp measuring staleness of external GitHub truth.

bypass_reason.description: Formal explanation when an operator bypasses preflight.
